name: Emblasoft nScan (Analytics)
description: Advanced analytics layer within nScan providing competitive visibility, deep KPI trending and anomaly detection across millions of real subscriber records using high-performance column-based data storage.
howItWorks: nScan's analytics engine queries the continuous passive capture store across millions of subscriber records at speed. Interactive dashboards surface KPI trends, anomalies and competitive performance gaps. Advanced queries enable operators to segment by geography, technology, time period and subscriber tier for competitive position measurement.
